    var ssrInfo = {"cacheExclusionReason":"","renderBodyTime":2428,"renderTimeStamp":1771911987681}

<script id="wix-first-paint">
    if (window.ResizeObserver &&
        (!window.PerformanceObserver || !PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes.indexOf('paint') === -1)) {
        new ResizeObserver(function (entries, observer) {
            entries.some(function (entry) {
                var contentRect = entry.contentRect;
                if (contentRect.width > 0 && contentRect.height > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(function (now) {
                        window.wixFirstPaint = now;
                        dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wixFirstPaint'));
                    });
                    observer.disconnect();
                    return true;
                }
            });
        }).observe(document.body);
    }
</script>


<script id="scroll-bar-width-calculation">
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.style.overflowY = 'scroll'
    div.style.width = '50px'
    div.style.height = '50px'
    div.style.visibility = 'hidden'
    document.body.appendChild(div)
    const scrollbarWidth= div.offsetWidth - div.clientWidth
    document.body.removeChild(div)
    if(scrollbarWidth > 0){
        document.body.style.setProperty('--scrollbar-width', `${scrollbarWidth}px`)
    }
</script>

}

    opacity: 0.7;
}

    mix-blend-mode: exclusion;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-card3dleft {
    transform-origin: 50%;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transform: perspective(100vh) rotateX(8deg) rotateY(-16deg) rotateZ(0);
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-card3dleftborder {
    transform-origin: 50%;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transform: perspective(100vh) rotateX(3deg) rotateY(-6deg) rotateZ(0);
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-blur {
    filter: blur(32px);
    -webkit-filter: blur(32px);
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-lightblur {
    filter: blur(8px);
    -webkit-filter: blur(8px);
}</style>

data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text">Aotearoa New Zealand: The Land of the Long White Cloud</h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-mkq668ra2" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-mkq668ra2 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">From rugged mountains to deep-rooted traditions, New Zealand offers a sanctuary for every type of traveler:</p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixGuard wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></p>

<ul class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Family &amp; Adventure:</span> Explore lush native bush reserves or enjoy kid-friendly activities in every region.</p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Cultural Immersion:</span> Deepen your soul in <span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Rotorua</span>, the heart of Māori culture and home to spectacular geothermal geysers.</p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Natural Wonders:</span> Marvel at the sheer cliffs of <span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Milford Sound</span> or find peace in the quiet majesty of the <span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Southern Alps.</span></p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Pure Indulgence:</span> Escape for a romantic getaway among the world-class wineries of <span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Marlborough.</span></p>
</li>
</ul></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--></div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-mkq8aete" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-mkq8aete wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX Energy</h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-mkq9g01a1" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-mkq9g01a1 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Australia blends a laid-back lifestyle with ancient landscapes carved by time.</p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixGuard wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></p>

<ul class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Iconic Landmarks</span>: Dive into the brilliant colours of&nbsp; the <span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Great Barrier Reef</span> or connect with the spiritual heart of Uluru or the Katherine Gorge.</p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Coastal Bliss:</span> Soak up the sun on the golden sands of <span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Bondi Beach or Whitehaven.</span></p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Unique Encounters:</span> Meet the locals, from kangaroos and quokkas to office workers on a lunch break in Melbourne&rsquo;s quirky, off the wall coffee laneways.</p>
</li>

Observe a Kiwi in New Zealand</h2></div></div></a><div class="CHRJex JMCi2v pu51Xe hKl06e xs2MeC"><div style="font-size:16px" class="nebVix hKl06e p8Uk20 blog-post-description-style-font blog-post-post-list-description-style-font mABNle HhgCcE" data-hook="post-description"><div class="wR7PET"><div class="BOlnTh" style="-webkit-line-clamp:3">And we are not talking about the approximately 5 million people who call Aotearoa New Zealand home. A kiwi is a flightless bird: elusive, nocturnal, and, like a true introvert, does not enjoy socialising. While kiwi once roamed the entire country, they are now largely confined to predator-free sanctuaries and remote islands. National Kiwi Hatchery breeding programme has been very successful saving the endangered kiwi, a NZ icon If you want to spot Aotearoa New Zealand&#x27;s natio</div></div></div></div></div><div class="CS4xCt TRcECH JGhsWK" data-hook="post-category-label"><a class="Ym42pV dqpczu" href="https://www.bestbitstravel.com/blog/categories/outdoors">NZ GREAT OUTDOORS TRAVEL GUIDE</a></div><div If you’ve followed my travels, you know I’m often found navigating the &quot;best bits&quot; of the South Pacific with Jay (my animated voice of reason) and Freddie (my very real, very fluffy shadow). But there is another side to the journey—one that doesn&#x27;t involve catching planes or deciphering weather disclaimers.
